definitions: Dan Macon is an American agricultural expert and farmer, known for his work in sheep and goat production and his involvement in various agricultural organizations in California.
Dan Macon is a name associated with a prominent figure in the California agricultural community, particularly in livestock management and agricultural policy.
examples: Dan Macon shared his insights on sustainable grazing practices.
The workshop featured a presentation by Dan Macon.
Dan Macon's farm is a model for efficient livestock operations.
